articles.title: Announcement from Binance Regarding "Bitcoin Cash Reserve Ended" FUD!
articles.description: Binance US, the US branch of the cryptocurrency exchange Binance, has responded to the Bitcoin Cash FUD that has spread recently. Continue Reading: Announcement from Binance Regarding "Bitcoin Cash Reserve Ended" FUD!

articles.title: $0.001 SHIB Price Beckons As Shiba Inu Ecosystem Flares With Massive Activity Ahead Of Shibarium Launch
articles.description: Moreover, the surging interest in Shiba Inu can also be attributed to anticipation around the mainnet launch of Shibarium, the ecosystem's layer-2 scaling solution. Over the past few months, speculations around the...

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Linked Wallet Invested 2013 Ethereum in OKX! Is it a Bearish Signal?
articles.description: An address associated with Lookonchain Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin said it has invested 2,013 ETH (worth $3.76 million) in OKX. Continue Reading: Vitalik Buterin Linked Wallet Invested 2013 Ethereum in OKX! Is it a Bearish Signal?

articles.title: Microstrategy Stock Soars 7% After Berenberg Says Bitcoin Halving May Trigger Rally
articles.description: A research note from Berenberg stated that the upcoming Bitcoin Halving could lead to a rally in MicroStrategy's share price.

articles.title: Brazil’s CBDC pilot contains code that can freeze or reduce funds, dev claims
articles.description: Pedro Magalhães, a blockchain developer who claims to have reverse-engineered Brazil’s pilot CBDC has found code that would allow accounts to be frozen or drained at will.
